project.name: SimpleGenomeHub
project.description: Builds, tests, and runs the SimpleGenomeHub project.

property.name: app.description
property.value: Genome and annotation management desktop application

fail.message: Java compiler not found. Provide toolchain/<platform>/ or set JAVA_HOME to a JDK 11+ installation.

echo.message: No bundled runtime found under ${host.toolchain.java.home} and JAVA_HOME is not usable. Skipping bundled runtime copy.

target.name: dist
target.echo: #!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)" cd "$SCRIPT_DIR" if [ -x "$SCRIPT_DIR/runtime/bin/java" ]; then JAVA_EXE="$SCRIPT_DIR/runtime/bin/java" elif [ -n "${JAVA_HOME:-}" ] && [ -x "$JAVA_HOME/bin/java" ]; then JAVA_EXE="$JAVA_HOME/bin/java" else JAVA_EXE="java" fi TOOLS_ROOT="$SCRIPT_DIR/bin/tools" TOOLS_DIR="" if [ -d "$TOOLS_ROOT" ]; then case "$(uname -s)" in Darwin) case "$(uname -m)" in arm64|aarch64) for candidate in "$TOOLS_ROOT/macos-arm64" "$TOOLS_ROOT/macos-universal" "$TOOLS_ROOT/macos-x64" "$TOOLS_ROOT"; do if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then TOOLS_DIR="$candidate" break fi done ;; *) for candidate in "$TOOLS_ROOT/macos-x64" "$TOOLS_ROOT/macos-universal" "$TOOLS_ROOT"; do if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then TOOLS_DIR="$candidate" break fi done ;; esac ;; Linux) case "$(uname -m)" in arm64|aarch64) for candidate in "$TOOLS_ROOT/linux-arm64" "$TOOLS_ROOT/linux-aarch64" "$TOOLS_ROOT"; do if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then TOOLS_DIR="$candidate" break fi done ;; *) for candidate in "$TOOLS_ROOT/linux-x64" "$TOOLS_ROOT/linux-amd64" "$TOOLS_ROOT"; do if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then TOOLS_DIR="$candidate" break fi done ;; esac ;; *) TOOLS_DIR="$TOOLS_ROOT" ;; esac fi if [ -n "$TOOLS_DIR" ] && [ -d "$TOOLS_DIR" ]; then export PATH="$TOOLS_DIR:$PATH" fi exec "$JAVA_EXE" "-Dsimplegenomehub.app.home=$SCRIPT_DIR" -cp "app/SimpleGenomeHub.jar:lib/*:tbtools/lib/*" simplegenomehub.gui.SimpleGenomeHubMainPanel

SimpleGenomeHub distribution
Contents - app/SimpleGenomeHub.jar - lib/ (general dependency jars) - tbtools/lib/TBtools_JRE1.6.jar - bin/tools/ (platform-scoped external executables) - runtime/ (bundled Java 11 runtime when available) - run.bat / run.ps1 / run.sh launch scripts
Requirements - No system Java is required if runtime/ is present - If runtime/ is missing, Java 11 or newer must be available - For local builds, copy a JDK-like Java 11 toolchain into toolchain/<platform>/ before running ant - The application stores user configuration under the current user's home directory - The launcher sets simplegenomehub.app.home to this folder for future exe compatibility - The launcher prefers the platform-specific tool directory under bin/tools/
Usage on Windows - Double-click run.bat - Or from PowerShell: .\run.ps1

# SimpleGenomeHub Release Package
This directory is the current Windows release package of SimpleGenomeHub.
## Contents
```text dist/ app/ SimpleGenomeHub.jar lib/ tbtools/ lib/ TBtools_JRE1.6.jar bin/ tools/ runtime/ run.bat run.ps1 run.sh ```
## What Each Folder Is For
- `app/`: main application jar built from the local `simplegenomehub` source code - `lib/`: Java runtime dependencies used by SimpleGenomeHub - `tbtools/lib/`: TBtools-related jar dependency used in integration points - `bin/tools/`: bundled external tool payload organized by platform, for example `windows-x64/` and `macos-x64/` - `runtime/`: bundled Java 11 runtime used by the launcher
## How To Run
### Windows
Double-click `run.bat`
Or start from PowerShell:
```powershell .\run.ps1 ```
## Runtime Requirement
- No system Java installation is required if `runtime/` exists - If `runtime/` is removed, Java 11 or newer must be available
## Important Notes
- The launcher automatically adds the current platform tool directory to `PATH` at startup - User configuration is stored under `%USERPROFILE%\.SimpleGenomeHub\` - Species/genome project data is stored in the directory configured by the user inside the application
## Source Boundary
The main program jar in `app/SimpleGenomeHub.jar` is built from the local `src/simplegenomehub/` codebase.
This release package also contains third-party binary dependencies, including:
- TBtools-related jar dependency - external command-line tools from the TBtools toolchain - bundled Java runtime
These are packaged as runtime dependencies, not merged source code.

target.name: package-windows-base
target.echo:
# SimpleGenomeHub Windows Release
## Contents
- `app/`: main application jar - `lib/`: Java dependency jars - `tbtools/lib/TBtools_JRE1.6.jar`: required TBtools dependency jar - `bin/tools/windows-x64/`: bundled Windows external tools - `runtime/`: bundled Windows Java runtime when present - `run.bat` and `run.ps1`: launchers
## How To Run
- Double-click `run.bat` - Or run `.\run.ps1` in PowerShell
## Runtime Notes
- This package is self-contained when `runtime/` exists - If `runtime/` is removed, Java 11 or newer must be available via `JAVA_HOME` or `PATH`

echo.message: Windows runtime not found under ${windows.toolchain.java.home}. Packaging without bundled runtime.

target.name: package-macos-base
target.echo:
#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)" cd "$SCRIPT_DIR"
if [ -d "$SCRIPT_DIR/bin/tools/macos-x64" ]; then chmod +x "$SCRIPT_DIR/bin/tools/macos-x64/"* 2>/dev/null || true export PATH="$SCRIPT_DIR/bin/tools/macos-x64:$PATH" fi
if [ -x "$SCRIPT_DIR/runtime/bin/java" ]; then JAVA_EXE="$SCRIPT_DIR/runtime/bin/java" elif [ -n "${JAVA_HOME:-}" ] && [ -x "$JAVA_HOME/bin/java" ]; then JAVA_EXE="$JAVA_HOME/bin/java" else JAVA_EXE="java" fi
exec "$JAVA_EXE" "-Dsimplegenomehub.app.home=$SCRIPT_DIR" -cp "app/SimpleGenomeHub.jar:lib/*:tbtools/lib/*" simplegenomehub.gui.SimpleGenomeHubMainPanel

# SimpleGenomeHub macOS Release
## Contents
- `app/`: main application jar - `lib/`: Java dependency jars - `tbtools/lib/TBtools_JRE1.6.jar`: required TBtools dependency jar - `bin/tools/macos-x64/`: bundled macOS Intel external tools - `runtime/`: bundled macOS Java runtime when present - `run.command` and `run.sh`: launchers
## How To Run
- In Terminal: `bash run.command` - Or make the launcher executable and double-click `run.command`
## Runtime Notes
- This package is self-contained only when `runtime/` exists - If `runtime/` is absent, Java 11 or newer must be available via `JAVA_HOME` or `PATH` - The current repository does not bundle a macOS Java runtime unless one is added under `toolchain/macos-x64/`

echo.message: macOS runtime not found under ${mac.toolchain.java.home}. Packaging macOS bundle without bundled runtime.

target.name: installer-windows
target.echo:
#define AppName "SimpleGenomeHub" #define AppVersion "${app.version}" #define AppPublisher "${app.vendor}"
[Setup] AppId={{8E2F1C47-B9D8-4704-9B74-63E5F55C6045} AppName={#AppName} AppVersion={#AppVersion} AppPublisher={#AppPublisher} DefaultDirName={autopf}\SimpleGenomeHub DefaultGroupName=SimpleGenomeHub DisableProgramGroupPage=yes OutputDir=${installers.dir} OutputBaseFilename=${windows.installer.name} Compression=lzma2 SolidCompression=yes WizardStyle=modern ArchitecturesAllowed=x64compatible ArchitecturesInstallIn64BitMode=x64compatible
[Tasks] Name: "desktopicon"; Description: "Create a desktop shortcut"; GroupDescription: "Additional icons:"; Flags: unchecked
[Files] Source: "${windows.package.dir}\*"; DestDir: "{app}"; Flags: ignoreversion recursesubdirs createallsubdirs
[Icons] Name: "{autoprograms}\SimpleGenomeHub"; Filename: "{app}\run.bat"; WorkingDir: "{app}"; Comment: "Launch SimpleGenomeHub" Name: "{autoprograms}\Uninstall SimpleGenomeHub"; Filename: "{uninstallexe}"; Comment: "Uninstall SimpleGenomeHub" Name: "{autodesktop}\SimpleGenomeHub"; Filename: "{app}\run.bat"; WorkingDir: "{app}"; Tasks: desktopicon; Comment: "Launch SimpleGenomeHub"
[Run] Filename: "{app}\run.bat"; Description: "Launch SimpleGenomeHub"; Flags: nowait postinstall skipifsilent

target.name: installer-macos
target.echo: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "https://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <dict> <key>CFBundleDevelopmentRegion</key> <string>en</string> <key>CFBundleDisplayName</key> <string>SimpleGenomeHub</string> <key>CFBundleExecutable</key> <string>SimpleGenomeHub</string> <key>CFBundleIdentifier</key> <string>org.simplegenomehub.SimpleGenomeHub</string> <key>CFBundleInfoDictionaryVersion</key> <string>6.0</string> <key>CFBundleName</key> <string>SimpleGenomeHub</string> <key>CFBundlePackageType</key> <string>APPL</string> <key>CFBundleShortVersionString</key> <string>${app.version}</string> <key>CFBundleVersion</key> <string>${app.version}</string> <key>LSMinimumSystemVersion</key> <string>10.13</string> <key>NSHighResolutionCapable</key> <true/> </dict> </plist>
